subject: LIGO/Virgo S190822c: Retraction of GW compact binary merger candidate
submitter: Brandon Piotrzkowski at U of Wisconsin-Milwaukee  <piotrzk3@uwm.edu>
body:
The LIGO Scientific Collaboration and the Virgo Collaboration report:

After human inspection, the trigger S190822c is no longer considered
to be a candidate of interest due to a data quality issue in the LIGO
Livingston detector.
